title: 3PCS Heart-Shaped Floral Foam Block, 30x30CM & 20x20CM Flower Foam Block with Tray, Green Foams for Flowers Heart Shape Florist Foams for Wedding Valentines Day Decorations
features: Premium Heart-Shaped Floral Foam Set : Includes 3 oasis floral foam heart shape (1 large: 30x30cm + 2 small: 20x20cm) with 3.9cm thickness, ideal for creating wedding car decor, table centrepieces, or DIY floral arrangements. The dark green colour of heart oasis florist foam blends seamlessly with foliage

Strong Suction Cup & Grid Tray : Each flower foam block with tray comes with a built-in suction cup for stable attachment to smooth surfaces (e.g., car bonnets, mirrors, or tables); The mesh grid tray of heart foam block prevents slipping and keeps stems upright

Fast Water Absorption & Long-Lasting Hydration: High-density foam hearts for flowers quickly absorbs and retains water, keeping fresh flowers hydrated for extended periods; Perfect for weddings, events, or home decor where freshness matters

Versatile for Professional & DIY Use : Flower arranging foam heart are suitable for florists, wedding planners, or hobbyists; Easily cut floral foam block into custom shapes for bouquets, wreaths, or corsages; Works with real or artificial flowers

Convenient & Reusable Design : Green foam for flowers heart shape are Individually vacuum-sealed for freshness; Lightweight yet sturdy—flower foam block heart are reusable for multiple events when stored properly
description: LOPYXBR Heart Shaped Oasis Floral Foam – Perfect for Weddings & Floral Arrangements Create stunning floral displays with our heart shaped oasis florist foam set, designed for secure, hassle-free flower arranging. Whether decorating a wedding car, crafting centrepieces, or designing DIY bouquets, this florist foam shapes provides a stable, hydrated foundation for flawless results Feature ✔ 3-Piece Set: Includes 1 large flower foam block heart (30x30cm) + 2 small (20x20cm) heart foam blocks—ideal for varied projects. ✔ Suction Cup Base of Heart Shaped Foam Block: Attaches firmly to car bonnets, glass, or tabletops without slipping. ✔ High-Quality Flower Foam: Retains water efficiently, extending flower freshness for events. ✔ Mesh Grid Tray: Flower sponge foam block heart keeps stems neatly arranged and prevents foam crumbling. ✔ Multi-Purpose Use: Perfect for weddings, parties, photo shoots, or home decor How to Use: 1.Soak heart foam block in water for 1-2 minutes until fully saturated; 2.Press suction cup onto a clean, smooth surface (e.g., car bonnet); 3.Insert flower stems at a slight angle for a full, balanced arrangement Specification Product name: Heart Shaped Oasis Floral Foam Materials: High-density floral foam Color: Dark Green Dimensions: Large (30x30x3.9cm), Small (20x20x3.9cm). Package included 1 * Large Foam Hearts for Flowers 2 * Small Flower Foam Block Heart
